Video.summary: When one of Eastbridge's most powerful socialities, is murdered, it is discovered she has been running a call girl service and one name on her list of clients is Commissioner Scali!
Video.title: The Rolodex Madam

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall pursue a security guard turned thief as he searches for the money he stole and lost.
Video.title: Million Dollar Misunderstanding

Video.summary: Tony's son David is shocked when his friend Jason shoots Brad Harris, the school bully. What follows is a crisis of conscience.
Video.title: Guns & Sons

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall realize they're attracted to each other as they protect an endangered witness.
Video.title: The Big Fall

Video.summary: Against departmental orders, Hunter goes to South America to stalk a diplomat who raped McCall.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 2

Video.summary: When McCall is raped by a South American diplomat immune from prosecution, Hunter follows him to his homeland.
Video.title: Rape And Revenge, Part 1

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter
Video.title: Dead End And Easy Money

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust his latest bounty at a railway station, the man slips from his grasp and the station, but not before stealing a car and killing the owner.
Video.title: White Picket Fences

Video.summary: By returning home to honor the one-year anniversary of his fiancee's death, Reno puts himself precariously close to Lt. Dixon's deadly clutches.
Video.title: The Hound

Video.summary: Reno may have met his match when Bobby sends him after a former heavyweight boxing champion turned convicted killer.
Video.title: The Champ

Video.summary: Reno's old friend, D.A. Harry Wells, recruits him to help find his daughter Dawn, who is being held hostage by her drug-dealing boyfriend.
Video.title: Vanished

Video.summary: A ghost from Reno's past appears and convinces him that his older brother Mitch, who went MIA over Cambodia 17 years ago and whom the government declared dead, is still alive.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 1

Video.summary: Reno's only means of saving himself and his brother is to break the psychological hold that Bracket's lies have over Mitch by reminding him of their past.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 2

Video.summary: Reno investigates a series of mysterious racehorse deaths.
Video.title: Dead Heat

Video.summary: Reno protects a deceased hit man's daughter and reveals the truth to her about her father's profession.
Video.title: An Uncle In The Business

Video.summary: A couple finds themselves in big trouble when their bizarre sex games go awry and a man is killed.
Video.title: Night Games

Video.summary: Rita goes undercover for the FBI to break up an international white slavery ring.
Video.title: Meat Market

Video.summary: Chris and Rita investigate the drug overdose of a supposedly reformed addict.
Video.title: Giant Steps

Video.summary: Chris and Rita pose as an engaged couple and attend a sex therapy clinic.
Video.title: Soul Kiss

Video.summary: Reno relentlessly pursues a Costa Rican criminal with diplomatic protection, but Reno is heading into a trap set by his old nemesis.
Video.title: Sawed-Off Shotgun Wedding

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby take a vacation in Mexico but find themselves working again when a young honeymooner disappears mysteriously.
Video.title: Honeymoon In Mexico

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby travel north to a strangely prosperous town where the citizens are very protective of a known criminal.
Video.title: The Ballad Of D.B. Cooper

Video.summary: Reno suspects that Bobby's new girlfriend has a deadly secret.
Video.title: Most Wanted

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby trail a beautiful escaped convict, but the real criminal mastermind is someone they would never suspect.
Video.title: Liar's Poker

Video.summary: Chris is wounded when he's set up for a hit man.
Video.title: Look The Other Way

Video.summary: When a love triangle involving a phony astrologist ends in murder, Chris and Rita investigate.
Video.title: Star Signs

Video.summary: Rita Infiltrates a phone sex operation to find a murderer.
Video.title: Voices
